label: clean_short_answer
text: Tokyo is in the JST time zone, which is UTC+9. Japan does not observe daylight saving time.

text:
To set up the project:
- Clone the repository
- Run npm install
- Copy .env.example to .env
- Start the dev server with npm run dev

The app will be available at localhost:3000.

label: clean_prose_paragraph
text: The French Revolution began in 1789 when fiscal crisis and social inequality converged. The Estates-General was convened for the first time since 1614, and the Third Estate broke away to form the National Assembly. Within weeks, the Bastille had fallen and the old regime was collapsing. The Declaration of the Rights of Man followed in August, establishing principles that would shape modern democracy.

- Avoid caffeine after noon

- Keep the temperature cool

## Understanding Git

Git is a version control system.

## Installation

Install it from git-scm.com.

## Basic Commands

Use git init to start.

## Branching

Branches let you work in parallel.

## Merging

Use git merge to combine branches.

## Conclusion

Git is essential for developers.
